mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visits ( page_url, referrer, ref_param, ip_address, user_agent, visited_at ) VALUES ( #{pageUrl}, #{referrer}, #{refParam}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{visitedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, page_url, referrer, ref_param, ip_address, user_agent, visited_at FROM visits ORDER BY visited_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 200
